title: ilex buxifolia
intro: Ilex buxifolia, also known as the Dahoon Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the southeastern United States, known for its evergreen leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Ilex buxifolia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
